title: How to get forms to select an existing entry
excerpt:
How do I get a form to select from an existing entry to populate the other fields? 
I don’t want a new entry, row.  I just want to modify fields in existing rows with the form.

posts.author: scottschindler (Michael Scott Schindler)
posts.cookedHtml:
How do I get a form to select from an existing entry to populate the other fields?

I don’t want a new entry, row. I just want to modify fields in existing rows with the form.

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml: The Cards view could serve you, maybe?..
